mapper.select:
SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , C.business_no , C.id_placeholder , C.pw_type , C.no_use , C.use_noti_talk , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end FROM company C
LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL
JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{year} AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year
JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year
WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CC.checkup_year DESC, C.company_name
